creator: Martin.Birgmeier@aon.at
text:
With the latest update to KDE 4.12.2, this problem (again) surfaces.

In http://mail.kde.org/pipermail/kde-freebsd/2013-February/014862.html a
possible solution is given, and indeed, if one removes
"http://mail.kde.org/pipermail/kde-freebsd/2013-February/014862.html"
from /usr/local/share/apps/cmake/modules/FindKDE4Internal.cmake, the
installation succeeds.
